rights_source: Made-in-China storefront operated by Shandong KAMA Automobile Manufacturing Co., Ltd. (manufacturer's own storefront) — packages/catalog/manufacturer-domains.json entry, ratified 2026-07-08
tls_note: Downloaded over plain HTTPS with a valid certificate (made-in-china.com platform CDN image.made-in-china.com). No -k needed. Full-size asset obtained via the 2f0j00 size-prefix; the storefront's own page also exposes smaller derivatives.
listing_specs: Dumper (tipper) truck, 4x2, one-and-half cabin, 1900mm cab width, engine Yc4fa120-33 (Yuchai), 8t class, air brake, 8GS46 gearbox.
candidate_selection_note: Selected from four photos on the listing (source original saved as sf-dumper-2.jpg). The other three are a portrait cab-door/interior shot (sf-dumper-1), and two identical dashboard interiors (sf-dumper-3/4) — none usable as an exterior hero. sf-dumper-2 is the only 3/4-front exterior.

rejected_alternatives.reason: genuine GM-family blue dumper, 3/4 front, void bg, but full-size caps at 800x800 (product long edge ~780px) < 1200px pre-flight floor
genuine KAMA dumper (composited-environment bg) but 700x491 < 1200px floor
genuine KAMA dumper (grey studio bg) but 700x491 < 1200px floor

rejected_alternatives.note: global-kama.com Special Vehicle category (crane/tanker/fire/rollback bodies) and truck categories (banners + spec tables only) host no GM-family dumper photo. kamaauto.cn has no dumper category (vans/EVs/light trucks only).
